title: Trump Admin Seeks To Revive Long-Discredited Wildfire Policy Amid Massive Blazes In The West
description: The deaths of three firefighters in Colorado are casting a spotlight on the Trump administration’s creation of a new federal fire agency and its revival of a previously discredited policy to stomp out all wildfires quickly.
content: The deaths of three U.S. government firefighters in a Colorado wildfire are casting a spotlight on the Trump administrations creation of a new federal fire service and its revival of a previously dis… [+7547 chars]
de: Der Trump-Administrator versucht, die seit langem diskreditierte Waldbrandpolitik inmitten massiver Brände im Westen wiederzubeleben. Der Tod von drei Feuerwehrleuten in Colorado wirft ein Schlaglicht auf die Schaffung einer neuen Bundesfeuerwehrbehörde durch die Trump-Regierung und die Wiederbelebung einer zuvor diskreditierten Politik, alle Waldbrände schnell zu bekämpfen.
en: Trump Admin Seeks To Revive Long-Discredited Wildfire Policy Amid Massive Blazes In The West. The deaths of three firefighters in Colorado are casting a spotlight on the Trump administration’s creation of a new federal fire agency and its revival of a previously discredited policy to stomp out all wildfires quickly.
la: BUCINUM Fusce ut vivifica Long-Discredited INCAENDIUM Policy Inter Massive ardet in Occidente. Mortes trium ignitorum in Colorado arcus in Trump administrandi crea- tionem novi procurationis ignis foederati et eius renovationem consilii antea improbati omnes ignes silvestres cito extinguere coniciunt.

title: Wagering on Wildfires? There’s a New Prediction Market for That
description: The platform, called Wyldfyre, claims it will "harness the wisdom of crowds" to improve wildfire forecasting. Experts argue that the risks outweigh the rewards.
content: As a series of raging wildfires erupted across Los Angeles in January 2025, destroying thousands of homes and killing hundreds, gamblers were eager to cash in. By mid-month, Polymarket bets on the sp… [+3090 chars]
de: Auf Waldbrände wetten? Dafür gibt es einen neuen Prognosemarkt. Die Plattform namens Wyldfyre behauptet, sie werde „die Weisheit der Massen nutzen“, um die Vorhersage von Waldbränden zu verbessern. Experten argumentieren, dass die Risiken den Nutzen überwiegen.
en: Wagering on Wildfires? There’s a New Prediction Market for That. The platform, called Wyldfyre, claims it will "harness the wisdom of crowds" to improve wildfire forecasting. Experts argue that the risks outweigh the rewards.
la: Gerens in Wildfires? Novus Praedictio Market ibi est pro Illo. In suggestu, nomine Wyldfyre, "armis prudentiam turbarum" sibi vindicat ut ignem ferum praevidens emendare possit. Periti argumentantur, pericula praeponderante.

title: EXCLUSIVE: DHS Reacts After Texas Woman Sentencing Over Fraudulent FEMA Claims Tied To Los Angeles Wildfires
description: Department of Homeland Security (DHS) responds to  Texas woman sentenced to prison for fraudulently obtaining federal disaster relief tied to the LA wildfires.
content:
Department of Homeland Security (DHS) responded on Wednesday to a Texas woman sentenced to prison for fraudulently obtaining federal disaster relief tied to the Los Angeles wildfires.
Joyce Turner, … [+3390 chars]
de: EXKLUSIV: Das DHS reagiert, nachdem eine Frau aus Texas wegen betrügerischer FEMA-Behauptungen im Zusammenhang mit Waldbränden in Los Angeles verurteilt wurde. Das Department of Homeland Security (DHS) antwortet auf eine Frau aus Texas, die wegen betrügerischer Beschaffung staatlicher Katastrophenhilfe im Zusammenhang mit den Waldbränden in Los Angeles zu einer Gefängnisstrafe verurteilt wurde.
en: EXCLUSIVE: DHS Reacts After Texas Woman Sentencing Over Fraudulent FEMA Claims Tied To Los Angeles Wildfires. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) responds to  Texas woman sentenced to prison for fraudulently obtaining federal disaster relief tied to the LA wildfires.
la: PRAECIPUUS: DHS Reacts Post Texas mulierem condemnatio de Fraudulento FEMA Clamat Ligatum Los Angeles Wildfires. Department of Securitatis Patriae (DHS) respondet mulier Texas in carcerem damnata propter fraudem calamitatis foederati obtinendae subsidio LA truculentiae alligato.

title: Europe hit by deadly weather extremes: Forest fire kills two in Greece, storms claim lives in the east and Portugal braces for 44C heat
description: The heatwave was the most severe ever recorded in Europe, with temperature records broken across large parts of the continent.
content:
Deadly weather has swept across Europe after last week's heatwave, with two people killed in a forest fire in Greece and storms claiming lives in Romania and Austria.
The heatwave was the most sever… [+7880 chars]
de: Europa wird von tödlichen Wetterextremen heimgesucht: Waldbrände töten zwei Menschen in Griechenland, Stürme fordern Todesopfer im Osten und Portugal bereitet sich auf Hitze von 44 °C vor. Die Hitzewelle war die schwerste, die jemals in Europa gemessen wurde, und in weiten Teilen des Kontinents wurden Temperaturrekorde gebrochen.
en: Europe hit by deadly weather extremes: Forest fire kills two in Greece, storms claim lives in the east and Portugal braces for 44C heat. The heatwave was the most severe ever recorded in Europe, with temperature records broken across large parts of the continent.
la: Europa extrema tempestate funesta ictus: Silva ignis in Graecia duas necat, tempestates in oriente et Portugallia calori 44C vitam adstringunt. In Europa gravissima caloris fuit umquam, cum monumenta temperatura trans magnas continentis partes fracta sunt.

title: Big wildfires hit Greece and France
description: Firefighters have been tackling huge wildfires in parts of Greece and southern France. Two people have died near Thessaloniki.
content: Authorities have urged residents of two villages in central Greece to evacuate as more than 135 firefighters battle a wildfire, a day after a separate forest fire killed a father and his 12-year-old … [+2239 chars]
de: Große Waldbrände haben Griechenland und Frankreich heimgesucht. Feuerwehrleute haben in Teilen Griechenlands und Südfrankreichs große Waldbrände bekämpft. In der Nähe von Thessaloniki sind zwei Menschen gestorben.
en: Big wildfires hit Greece and France. Firefighters have been tackling huge wildfires in parts of Greece and southern France. Two people have died near Thessaloniki.
la: Ignes magni Graeciae et Galliae feriunt. In partibus Graeciae et Franciae meridionalis incendia immania armaverunt. Duo homines prope Thessalonica mortui sunt.
